data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Turnover checklist completion sign-off' but did not provide any concrete evidence or checks performed to confirm that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for this sign-off, but there is no evidence indicating that the turnover checklist was completed or signed off in the current saga run. This lack of evidence leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in fulfilling this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the completion and sign-off of the turnover checklist.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
